title: Geopolitical Strategic Competition
description: RAND's research and analyses on geopolitical strategic competition examine the strategies, capabilities, and interactions of major global powers, focusing on how these dynamics influence international security, economic relations, and U.S. interests. This work provides policymakers with evidence-based insights and recommendations to navigate challenges such as great-power rivalry, technological competition, and shifting alliances in a complex global environment.
